query: SELECT u.id, u.name, up.gender, up.ageRange, up.occupation, up.budgetLevel, up.stylePreference, up.onboardingCompleted FROM users u LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON u.id = up.userId ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, up.gender, up.ageRange, up.occupation, up.budgetLevel, up.stylePreference, up.onboardingCompleted FROM users u LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON u.id = up.userId ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 5;
